{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032015331222725091D134EEF126EC"}"},"total":55},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7163992773296325406","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者大大作为一个新手，前期没有太大的毒点，但写出了群像文的感觉，文笔中上，构思较好。但是作为一个新手，这样已经非常棒了。五星加分不够多，四星送上。支持新作者[奸笑][奸笑]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1667997138,"group_id":"7143479830439267358","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"云无心以出岫，鸟倦飞而知还","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2E/I3D8d4jQ6prasvp6y00=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a3faaaa1dec24f1596a9f9b39bd2c047~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776531514&x-signature=YizZIaYZhU75O3aogCzCMNsxyhg%3D","user_id":"822064259012644","user_name":"画无心"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"822064259012644","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7143479830439267358","book_info":{"abstract":"【杀伐果断+修为逆天+爽文+单女主+智商在线】

作为修罗魔域的主宰者，林溟拥有着一统六界的野心与实力！

但六界之中也埋藏着惊天之密！绝世枭雄争锋六界，妖孽天骄辈出。这是一个璀璨盛世，也是无数枭雄天骄的落寞！


在这个群雄逐鹿的盛世，林溟手持一柄古朴木剑，靠着权谋与力量，站在了巅峰之上！


但这柄木剑也让林溟万般因果加身！只因这柄木剑来历达到了惊世骇俗的地步！

这并不是结束，只是刚刚开始的征途！

六界之上，还有诸天万界！而这六界也曾极度辉煌！只因六界曾经也存在于万界，真正的六大巅峰巨头！

为解开这一系列的谜团，林溟开始进军万界，寻找掩盖百万载的惊世之谜！

却发现！

像诸天万界的还有两个平行宇宙！

一个宇宙黯淡无光，三千本源法则尽失，毫无生命迹象！

另一个则是充满了黑暗，存在着异常强大的力量，有这极强的侵略性！

更加诡异的是林溟身上存在着与这个宇宙密不可分的联系！

经过发现，他竟然是......！！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o4d0dbe0af675294c3bbb26822dc67330~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"三秋寒霜","author_id":"","book_id":"7143479830439267358","book_name":"玄幻：起点不高，修罗界主","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":258,"name":"传统玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=258&name=传统玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7144521180140012039","read_count":"88","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"211034"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.1","serial_count":"102","tags":"传统玄幻,玄幻,单女主,架空,东方玄幻","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o4d0dbe0af675294c3bbb26822dc67330~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779175992&x-signature=eNiQ4EhdXVZlXz2GXVx8h6S3mzM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3394883197876632","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"3.558731e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032015331222725091D134EEF126EC"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读59分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3558,"reply_count":3,"show_pv":4837},"user_actio
